This medicine may not be right for you. Read the label before purchase.

A consciously created plant active in a convenient, readily absorbed liquid herbal extract.

Calm nerves: Ashwagandha is traditionally used in Ayurvedic Medicine to calm nerves and relieve nervous tension.

Nervous system: Ashwagandha is traditionally used in Ayurvedic Medicine as a nervine to support nervous system health.

Restorative tonic: Ashwagandha is traditionally used in Ayurvedic Medicine as a restorative tonic and to help support vitality.

You can expect a bitter taste, which is typical of herbal extracts and all of their goodness.

Complemented with natural peppermint oil. Contains Alcohol.

Cenovis 50+ Multi is specially formulated to support the body's energy levels, nervous system and immune system function for general health and wellbeing. Proudly Australian Made by Cenovis and trusted by Australian families for over 80 years, Cenovis 50+ Multi is quality tested during manufacturing to ensure product consistency and potency. Cenovis 50+ Multi contains no added gluten, artificial flavours, lactose or dairy products, or artificial sweeteners.** Adults 50 years and over: take 1 capsule daily with morning meal. The recommended daily amount of Vitamin A from all sources is 700 micrograms retinol equivalents (R.E) (2330IU) for women and 900 micrograms R.E (3000IU) for men. This product contains selenium which is toxic in high doses. A daily dose of 150 micrograms for adults of selenium from dietary supplements should not be exceeded. Vitamin and mineral supplements should not replace a balanced diet.

- helps support bone mineralisation in post-menopausal women
- maintains bone health

name: Hair Skin & Nails Tablets with Biotin
description: NATURES OWN HAIR SKIN NAILS 50PK
long_description:
Support healthy skin, hair, and nails with Nature's Own Hair, Skin & Nails Tablets. Each tablet contains a combination* of Vitamin B3, Vitamin C, Copper, Manganese, Selenium, Zinc, Biotin, and Equisetum arvense dry stem extract (Horsetail), which supports collagen formation and also maintains skin, hair, and nail health. In addition, Nature's Own Hair, Skin & Nails tablets also act as an antioxidant to reduce free radical formation in the body, and supports healthy immune system function. Adults, take 1 tablet twice daily with food, or as recommended by your healthcare professional. Always read the label and follow the directions for use. Vitamin and mineral supplements should not replace a balanced diet. Australian Made, and rigorously tested to ensure quality, potency, and purity, Nature's Own Hair, Skin & Nails Tablets contain no added gluten, lactose, artificial flavours, artificial sweeteners, artificial preservatives, dairy products or animal-derived products.

*This product contains selenium which is toxic in high doses. A daily dose of 150 micrograms for adults of selenium from dietary supplements should not be exceeded. WARNING: Contains Zinc, which may be dangerous if taken in large amounts or for a long period. Contains soya ben products.
  • SUPPORTS SKIN HEALTH: Taken as directed, this vitamin and mineral supplement* helps maintain healthy skin and hair, as well as nail health

  • MAINTAINS COLLAGEN: Nature's Own Hair, Skin & Nails tablets provide support for the formation of collagen in the body

  • ANTIOXIDANT: The antioxidant properties of this formulation of vitamins and minerals* reduces the formation of free radicals in the body to reduce free radical damage to body cells, as well as supporting healthy immune system function

  • EASY DAILY DOSE: Take 1 tablet twice daily with food, or as recommended by your healthcare professional

  • Contains no added gluten, lactose, artificial flavours, artificial sweeteners, artificial preservatives, dairy products or animal-derived products

  • Always read the label and follow the directions for use. See product warnings below.

description: ECO TOOLS POWDER PUFF DUO
long_description:
The EcoTools Powder Puff Duo is designed with two different sized makeup puffs for all your setting, baking, and mattifying needs. The makeup puffs are designed with a finger band to help keep the puffs in place for controlled, precise application. Dip either the small or large powder puff in your favorite loose or pressed powder and tap off any excess. Then gently press the face puff onto your skin to bake and set makeup. The full-size makeup puff helps set larger areas such as your forehead and t-zone. The mini makeup puff is best for setting under the eyes and other tight areas of the face. Superior performance made sustainable. The EcoTools Powder Puffs are made from 100% polyester, and, as with all our EcoTools products, this Powder Puff Duo is 100% cruelty-free and vegan.
  • Mini makeup puff for extra precision under the eyes

  • Best used with loose or pressed powder

  • Finger band for controlled application

The best hair elastics for those gals with thick hair

Is your hair elastic constantly letting you down by not holding your hair in place all day long? We have the solution! We know the struggles of having thick hair, that is why our Elastics For All Hair were made for those with thick hair in mind.

Our Scunci No Damage Hair elastics are specifically designed to give a firm, secure and comfortable all day hold without causing damage or breakage. Designed with a thick elastic, worry no more about your style falling out!

Ideal for the sporty gal on the go

Not only are they ideal for thick hair, impress at the gym with these hair elastics! Strong enough to hold your style throughout your whole workout, so you won't have to worry about your hair falling out of place. Focus on your workout and take the stress out of your hairstyle with this hair elastic pack.

Get a chic, on-trend style that you will love with our hair elastics for all hair

Make the ultimate hair statement and keep your hair in all day long with our hair elastics for all hair. Whether you want a gorgeous up-do to impress Mr. Tinder, a high ponytail to rule the school or a simple bun for your work meetings, we've got you covered!

With 10 pcs in black or pop neon colours, don't be afraid to be bold and express yourself with a splash of colour, or for a more casual look our black pack is ideal - or better yet, grab both packs today!

long_description:
Skincare meets makeup! This product is the perfect combination of skincare and makeup. The formula provides the benefits of a skincare serum with the radiance and coverage of a foundation. True Match Tinted Serum has become a viral icon that's loved all over the world by consumers, influencers and derms! With its 10 super blendable, skin adapting shades, this skincare makeup hybrid product easily and seamlessly melts and blends on to various skin tones, leaving skin with a naturally luminous finish.

  • Deeply hydrates and visibly replumps the skin.

  • Infused with 1% Pure Hyaluronic Acid.

  • Proven to smooth skin overtime*.*Evaluation over 42 women in clinical test after 6 weeks of daily use.

description: L'OREAL TRUE MATCH SERUM FOUNDATION LIGHT-MEDIUM
long_description:
Skincare meets makeup! This product is the perfect combination of skincare and makeup. The formula provides the benefits of a skincare serum with the radiance and coverage of a foundation. True Match Tinted Serum has become a viral icon that's loved all over the world by consumers, influencers and derms! It's now powered by plumping micro-epidermic Pure Hyaluronic Acid, which is 50 times smaller than the standard ingredient for deeper penetration. The result? Stronger, deeper skincare benefits, leaving skin replumped in just 1 hour! NEW AND IMPROVED FORMULA - Thanks to the new improved formula with micro-epidermic Pure Hyaluronic Acid, this tinted serum foundation is proven to visibly replump the skin and provide up to 24H hydration while reducing the appearance of fine lines. - This product is now also enriched with quenching glycerin, which works quickly and effectively to hydrate the skin. - It is also infused with luminous mineral pigments that give radiant, flawless coverage like a foundation, while also being lightweight and suitable for sensitive skin. With its 10 super blendable, skin adapting shades, this skincare makeup hybrid product easily and seamlessly melts and blends on to various skin tones, leaving skin with a naturally luminous finish.
  • Makeup and Skincare combined - the perfect beauty hybrid to add to your routine.

  • Deeply hydrates and visibly replumps the skin

  • Now with micro-epidermic Pure Hyaluronic Acid which is x50 smaller than standard hyaluronic acid, resulting in deeper penetration and better skincare results.

  • Proven to smooth skin overtime*. *Evaluation over 42 women in clinical test after 6 weeks of daily use.

  • Naturally illuminates the skin, helping to even out skin tone.

name: Paris True Match Radiant Serum Concealer 2c
description: L'OREAL PARIS TRUE MATCH RADIANT SERUM CONCEALER 2C 10ML
long_description:
Why just conceal when you can shape and contour your face, while your serum concealer replumps your skin where needed, all at the same time? Discover the new True Match Radiant Serum Concealer by L'Oreal Paris, a multi-purpose under-eye concealer that does it all. Enriched with 1.5% Hyaluronic Acid and a Caffeine complex, this product that combines skincare and makeup to correct like a concealer and hydrate like an eye serum. Gone are the days of compromising between coverage and skincare benefits. A unique iron applicator is designed for precise and even application under the eye or any other target areas across the face. This concealer comes in a range of 12 radiant shades, suitable for a range of skin tones. Elevate your makeup routine and play with multiple shades to achieve your desired makeup look, because True Match is more than just a concealer. Time to complete your flawless makeup routine with: - True Match Tinted Serum Foundation: Our global viral sensation that delivers a radiant skin finish, covering like a foundation while hydrating your skin like a serum. - True Match Powder: A light-textured powder that perfectly matches the colour and texture of your skin to achieve a flawless finish. - True Match Blush: A super-blendable powder blush with a soft texture that goes on smooth with a long-wear formula giving your cheeks a flush of natural colour.
  • Benefits of the True Match Radiant Serum Concealer: - Replumps the skin and smoothes fine lines under eyes thanks to its 1.5% Hyaluronic Acid + Caffeine Complex - Provides a radiant finish for a brighter complexion - Offers a wide selection of 12 concealer shades to suit a range of skin tones - Has a unique iron-shaped applicator that delivers an even and precise application - Helps sculpt face through concealing, contouring and highlighting.

name: Paris True Match Radiant Serum Concealer 1n
description: L'OREAL PARIS TRUE MATCH RADIANT SERUM CONCEALER 1N 10ML
long_description:
Why just conceal when you can shape and contour your face, while your serum concealer replumps your skin where needed, all at the same time? Discover the new True Match Radiant Serum Concealer by L'Oreal Paris, a multi-purpose under-eye concealer that does it all. Enriched with 1.5% Hyaluronic Acid and a Caffeine complex, this product that combines skincare and makeup to correct like a concealer and hydrate like an eye serum. Gone are the days of compromising between coverage and skincare benefits. A unique iron applicator is designed for precise and even application under the eye or any other target areas across the face. This concealer comes in a range of 12 radiant shades, suitable for a range of skin tones. Elevate your makeup routine and play with multiple shades to achieve your desired makeup look, because True Match is more than just a concealer. Time to complete your flawless makeup routine with: - True Match Tinted Serum Foundation: Our global viral sensation that delivers a radiant skin finish, covering like a foundation while hydrating your skin like a serum. - True Match Powder: A light-textured powder that perfectly matches the colour and texture of your skin to achieve a flawless finish. - True Match Blush: A super-blendable powder blush with a soft texture that goes on smooth with a long-wear formula giving your cheeks a flush of natural colour.
  • Benefits of the True Match Radiant Serum Concealer: - Replumps the skin and smoothes fine lines under eyes thanks to its 1.5% Hyaluronic Acid + Caffeine Complex - Provides a radiant finish for a brighter complexion - Offers a wide selection of 12 concealer shades to suit a range of skin tones - Has a unique iron-shaped applicator that delivers an even and precise application - Helps sculpt face through concealing, contouring and highlighting

Discover Revlon's Illuminance Light Reflecting Finishing Powder, an ultra fine pressed powder with a light reflecting formula to diffuse light as it hits the skin while controling oil and minimising shine. The formula contains soft-focus micro-powders to smooth and blur the appearance of fine lines and imperfections while gently evening skin tone.

name: BB Cream Medium
description: RIMMEL BB CREAM MEDIUM
long_description:
Want the London look? Get un-BB-believable flawless skin! Better than a moisturiser, better than a foundation BB Cream in Medium from Rimmel London is a skin-perfecting super makeup developed specifically for women with darker complexions who won't wear foundation. The perfect 9-part regimen in one easy step: it primes, moisturises, minimises pores, conceals, covers, smooths, mattifies, brightens, and helps protect. This lightweight, ultra-comfortable formula instantly gives you flawless skin with a healthy glow. If you don't use traditional foundation when preparing for a day at the office or a night out with the girls, then BB Cream makes a great everyday base. Apply a tiny bit, the size of a pea, focusing on your problem areas and blend. It meshes nicely with skin and has a moisturizing and brightening effect that's ideal for normal to dry skin. Once set, it gives you a seamless finish, providing sheer-to-medium coverage. If you want a very natural looking finish that does a great job of evening out your skintone, try BB Cream from Rimmel London. Makes a great gift for a girlfriend, sister or even your mum! Rimmel London is an inner confidence that how we look is always cool, irreverent, never predictable and always evolving. Rimmel is not perfection or intimidating, it is like London: young, urban, eclectic, edgy. It is expression with no rules, it is real, it is accessible. Live the London look.
  • Long-lasting finish

  • Transfer-proof

  • With SPF 15 & UVB filters to protect your skin from external aggressions

  • 24HR moisturisation

To mattify your complexion and as finishing touch over your foundation, there's nothing like Rimmel Stay Matte Pressed Powder. Try it once and you won't want to go without it. The ultimate essential in your beauty bag. Rimmel London is an inner confidence that how we look is always cool, irreverent, never predictable and always evolving.

name: BB Cream Light
description: RIMMEL BB CREAM  LIGHT
long_description:
Want the London look? Get un-BB-believable flawless skin! Better than a moisturiser, better than a foundation BB Cream in Light from Rimmel London is a skin-perfecting super makeup developed specifically for women with lighter complexions who won't wear foundation. The perfect 9-part regimen in one easy step: it primes, moisturises, minimises pores, conceals, covers, smooths, mattifies, brightens, and helps protect. This lightweight, ultra-comfortable formula instantly gives you flawless skin with a healthy glow. If you don't use traditional foundation when preparing for a day at the office or a night out with the girls, then BB Cream makes a great everyday base. Apply a tiny bit, the size of a pea, focusing on your problem areas and blend. It meshes nicely with skin and has a moisturizing and brightening effect that's ideal for normal to dry skin. Once set, it gives you a seamless finish, providing sheer-to-medium coverage. If you want a very natural looking finish that does a great job of evening out your skintone, try BB Cream from Rimmel London. Makes a great gift for a girlfriend, sister or even your mum! Rimmel London is an inner confidence that how we look is always cool, irreverent, never predictable and always evolving. Rimmel is not perfection or intimidating, it is like London: young, urban, eclectic, edgy. It is expression with no rules, it is real, it is accessible. Live the London look.
  • Long-lasting finish

  • Transfer-proof

  • With SPF 15 & UVB filters to protect your skin from external aggressions

  • 24HR moisturisation

name: True Match Serum Foundation Very Light
description: L'OREAL TRUE MATCH SERUM FOUNDATION VERY LIGHT 0.5-2 30ML
long_description:
Skincare meets makeup! This product is the perfect combination of skincare and makeup. The formula provides the benefits of a skincare serum with the radiance and coverage of a foundation. True Match Tinted Serum has become a viral icon that's loved all over the world by consumers, influencers and derms! It's now powered by plumping micro-epidermic Pure Hyaluronic Acid, which is 50 times smaller than the standard ingredient for deeper penetration. The result? Stronger, deeper skincare benefits, leaving skin replumped in just 1 hour! NEW AND IMPROVED FORMULA - Thanks to the new improved formula with micro-epidermic Pure Hyaluronic Acid, this tinted serum foundation is proven to visibly replump the skin and provide up to 24H hydration while reducing the appearance of fine lines. - This product is now also enriched with quenching glycerin, which works quickly and effectively to hydrate the skin. - It is also infused with luminous mineral pigments that give radiant, flawless coverage like a foundation, while also being lightweight and suitable for sensitive skin. With its 10 super blendable, skin adapting shades, this skincare makeup hybrid product easily and seamlessly melts and blends on to various skin tones, leaving skin with a naturally luminous finish.
  • Makeup and Skincare combined - the perfect beauty hybrid to add to your routine.

  • Deeply hydrates and visibly replumps the skin

  • Infused with 1% Pure Hyaluronic Acid.

  • Now with micro-epidermic Pure Hyaluronic Acid which is x50 smaller than standard hyaluronic acid, resulting in deeper penetration and better skincare results

  • Proven to smooth skin overtime*.*Evaluation over 42 women in clinical test after 6 weeks of daily use.

description: RIMMEL STAY MATTE PRESS POWDER TRANSPARNT #001:.:14 GRAM
long_description:
Want the London look? Say goodbye to shine with Stay Matte Pressed Powder from Rimmel London! This oil absorbing pressed powder helps to minimize the appearance of large pores and leaves you with a flawless, natural, shine-free complexion. Dermatologically tested, its smooth non-powdery texture keeps everything in place. Perfect for all skin types, it helps to set concealer, foundation or any base makeup without changing the colour of the product, giving you a natural non-cakey finish which is completely undetectable. For long lasting shine protection at work or out on the town, make Stay Matte your go-to powder! Apply a light dusting with a brush and blend onto skin to set your foundation and create a true matte look. Then use it as a shine cover-up as you need it throughout the day with a poof. To mattify your complexion and set your foundation, there's nothing like Rimmel Stay Matte Pressed Powder. Try it once and you won't want to go without it. Perfect as a gift for a girlfriend, sister or mum! Rimmel London is an inner confidence that how we look is always cool, irreverent, never predictable and always evolving. Rimmel is not perfection or intimidating, it is like London: young, urban, eclectic, edgy. It is expression with no rules, it is real, it is accessible. Live the London look.

  • Up to 6 hours shine control

  • Contains natural minerals and powders

  • Dermatologically tested

  • Contains natural minerals and powders

name: Lifter Glaze Lip Balm Pink Drip
description: MAYBELLINE LIFTER GLAZE LIP BALM PINK DRIP 2.8G
long_description:
Meet Lifter Glaze Oil Balm: for lips so smooth + glowy-they're glazed, Now you can glaze lips in melty goodness. Formulated with Hyaluronic Acid + Acerola Cherry Extract. Up to 24H hydration you crave, lip lines visibly reduced by 20%*. *Cosmeto-clinical study, 45 subjects, after 4 weeks
  • Lifter Glaze Oil Balm is formulated with Hyaluronic Acid + Acerola Cherry Extract and hydrates lips for 24H.

  • This oil balm melts to lips for a glazed, smooth look and ultra-comfortable feel.

  • 24H hydration, fuller look. This lip glaze leaves lips feeling smooth and moisturized all day. Now, your lips stay glazed with lip lines visibly reduced by 20%* , and after 4 weeks of daily use lips feel softer, and look smoother + healthier. *Cosmeto-clinical study, 45 subjects, after 4 weeks.

  • Innovative glaze technology. Lifter Glaze Oil Balm's innovative glaze technology has a 73% oil blend and melts on lips and lip lines visibly reduced by 20%*. Plus, it's formulated with Hyaluronic Acid + Acerola Cherry Extract and it has glazed pigments. *Cosmeto-clinical study, 45 subjects, after 4 weeks.

  • This hydrating lip balm has glazed pigments that tint lips in sheer, buildable color. Lifter Glaze is available in 10 glazed shades that last, and with 24-hour hydration that you crave.

name: Lip Exfoliator Strawberry
description: E.L.F. LIP EXFOLIATOR STRAWBERRY 3GRAM
long_description: Hey, sugar lips: we've made our nourishing exfoliating lip sugar scrub even sweeter with a new packaging, improved formula, and yummy new scents! The perfect way to prep your pout, this lip scrub buffs away dry, dead skin from your lips and infuses them with oils for a smooth and kissable feel. With exfoliated lips, your lipstick will glide on with ease, look smoother, and stay on longer.

name: Colorstay Overtime #38 Always Sienna Lipcolor
description: REVLON COLORSTAY OVERTIME #38 ALWAYS SIENNA LIPCOLOR 2ML
long_description:
This transfer-proof, kiss-proof lip colour lasts up to 16 hours. 
The dual-end applicator provides vibrant colour application at one end, then seals in the colour with a slick gloss at the other end.
Formula is infused with moisturising ingredients including vitamin E, chamomile, and soy extract.
